ui_label: Horizontal grid cell with a regular latitude longitude grid type and 2 x 2 degree resolution.
description: GAMIL3 is the atmospheric component of FGOALS-g3 with a latitude–longitude grid in the horizontal direction, and a σ coordinate in the vertical dimension. CAS-LSM is the land component of FGOALS-g3 with the same horizontal resolution as the atmospheric component. LICOM3 is the oceanic component of FGOALS-g3 with the arbitrary orthogonal curvilinear coordinates. The Los Alamos sea ice model Version 4.0 is the sea ice component of FGOALS-g3 with the same grid as the oceanic model.
